name: Summoning a spellbook deducts gold and adds a book to the inventory grid
description: With a fresh game (100 gold), pressing Summon spends the shown cost and a level-1 book appears in the inventory.

planSteps.description: Navigate to the game homepage and wait for the game HUD showing GOLD to load
Note the current GOLD value in the HUD and the cost shown on the SUMMON button
Verify the GOLD value in the HUD decreased by the summon cost that was displayed
Verify exactly one inventory cell in the books grid now shows a book labeled LV 1 with an element name
